# App secrets

POSTGRES_PRIMARY_PASSWORD=change_me

POSTGRES_PASSWORD=change_me
POSTGRES_DB=school_schedule
REDIS_PASSWORD=change_me

# Email
EMAIL_SMTP_USERNAME=support@classplanner.ru
EMAIL_SMTP_PASSWORD=change_me
EMAIL_FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3001

# Docker network
DOCKER_NETWORK_NAME=school_net

# Domains (Traefik)
API_DOMAIN=api.localhost
FRONTEND_DOMAIN=localhost
GRAFANA_DOMAIN=grafana.localhost
TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_DOMAIN=traefik.localhost
LOGS_DOMAIN=logs.localhost

# Frontend build-time (Next.js)
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost/api

# Traefik
TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_IP_WHITELIST=0.0.0.0/0

# Grafana
GRAFANA_ROOT_URL=http://grafana.localhost
GRAFANA_SERVE_FROM_SUB_PATH=false
GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD=change_me
GRAFANA_PLUGINS=

# Elasticsearch / Kibana (X-Pack Basic)
ELASTIC_PASSWORD=change_me
KIBANA_SYSTEM_PASSWORD=change_me
# Kibana admin (вход в UI)
KIBANA_ADMIN_USERNAME=admin
KIBANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD=change_me
# base64("elastic:<password>")
ELASTICSEARCH_BASIC_AUTH=change_me
XPACK_SECURITY_ENCRYPTIONKEY=change_me_change_me_change_me_change_me
XPACK_ENCRYPTEDSAVEDOBJECTS_ENCRYPTIONKEY=change_me_change_me_change_me_change_me
XPACK_REPORTING_ENCRYPTIONKEY=change_me_change_me_change_me_change_me

# Kafka (optional)
KAFKA_INTERNAL_PORT=9092
KAFKA_EXTERNAL_PORT=9095
KAFKA_CONTROLLER_PORT=9093
KAFKA_CLUSTER_ID=local-kafka-cluster
